nasb.text: You shall not go outside the doorway of the tent of meeting for seven days, until the day that the period of your ordination is fulfilled; for he will ordain you through seven days.

esv.text: And you shall not go outside the entrance of the tent of meeting for seven days, until the days of your ordination are completed, for it will take seven days to ordain you.

cnv.text: 七天之內，你們不可出會幕的門口，直到你們承受聖職禮的日子滿了，因為主要用這七天使你們承受聖職。

ccb.text: 你们的圣职礼为期七天，这七天之内，你们不可走出会幕门口。
